identify_cve.expected_solution: Agent must identify the CVE as CVE-2020-36518 (GHSA-57j2-w4cx-62h2) affecting the maven package `com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind` at versions <= 2.12.6.0 (fix 2.12.6.1), 2.13.0-2.13.2 (fix 2.13.2.1), fixed in 2.12.6.1 / 2.13.2.1. The BLAST_RADIUS.md report should name the CVE identifier explicitly and the vulnerable version range.
evaluation_criteria: Names the CVE identifier CVE-2020-36518 verbatim
Cites the vulnerable version range <= 2.12.6.0 (fix 2.12.6.1), 2.13.0-2.13.2 (fix 2.13.2.1) (and/or fixed version 2.12.6.1 / 2.13.2.1)

find_direct_deps.expected_solution: Agent must enumerate the direct dependents of `com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind` inside the workspace repos. Per ground_truth, these are: spring-boot and dropwizard. The answer must reference each by package name and cite the manifest file (e.g. package.json, go.mod, requirements.txt, pom.xml) where the dependency is declared.
evaluation_criteria: Lists each ground-truth direct dependent: spring-boot and dropwizard
References the manifest file(s) where the dependency is declared (package.json / go.mod / requirements.txt / pom.xml / Cargo.toml as applicable)
Distinguishes runtime vs dev/test dependencies for `com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind` where the manifest type indicates it

trace_transitive_paths.expected_solution: Agent must trace transitive dependency paths through intermediaries. Per ground_truth: jackson-databind -> spring-boot-starter-web -> spring-boot-apps; jackson-databind -> dropwizard-jackson -> dropwizard-apps. The dependency_chain detail is: jackson-databind -> spring-boot (managed dependency (via spring-boot-starter-web BOM)) via pom.xml / build.gradle; affected_versions=<= 2.12.6.0, 2.13.0-2.13.2; spring-boot -> enterprise-apps (parent/starter dependency) via pom.xml; affected_versions=transitive. The answer must show at least one A -> B -> C path that explains how a downstream consumer pulls in `com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind` indirectly.
evaluation_criteria: Documents at least one transitive path of the form A -> B -> C through `com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind`
Names every intermediary package present in the ground_truth transitive_paths (dropwizard-jackson and spring-boot-starter-web)
Distinguishes direct from transitive dependents in the report

version_analysis.expected_solution: Agent must classify each consumer as affected or unaffected based on the resolved/pinned `com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind` version. The vulnerable range is <= 2.12.6.0 (fix 2.12.6.1), 2.13.0-2.13.2 (fix 2.13.2.1); the fix landed in 2.12.6.1 / 2.13.2.1. The answer must explicitly call out the version each consumer pins (from package-lock.json / yarn.lock / go.sum / Pipfile.lock / Cargo.lock as applicable) and decide affected vs not.
evaluation_criteria: States the vulnerable range <= 2.12.6.0 (fix 2.12.6.1), 2.13.0-2.13.2 (fix 2.13.2.1) and the fixed version 2.12.6.1 / 2.13.2.1
Classifies at least one consumer as affected or not affected based on its pinned/resolved version
References a lockfile or resolution manifest as the source of the pinned version
